sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20704" key="boutrofi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βου-τροφία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n20704.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">feeding of cattle</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0067.tlg001:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Agatharch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
